category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Corral as a dependency manager for the Pony language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is corral; official ponylang repository uses Corral/corral for the project.
docs_sources: Official ponylang GitHub README is the available project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states dependency manager for Pony; source_facts.executables lists the corral CLI.
